goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'boat'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'leicester' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 08:30' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of boat
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from leicester and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 08:30 and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get train ID and departure time
